headline: A Closer Look At Freeport McMoRan (FCX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) has been on the radar recently after its share price closed at $52.09, with a return of 31.22% over the past year and 69.28% over five years. See our latest analysis for Freeport-McMoRan. The recent 1 month share price return of a 19.04% decline and 7 day share price return of a 7.61% decline contrast with a 1 year total shareholder return of 31.22%. This suggests that longer term momentum has been stronger than the latest pullback. If you want to see how other copper...
